name: Mobility portal exports
description: Public mobility indicators and corridor usage snapshots curated from Timișoara open data.

name: Infrastructure layers
description: Road geometry, intersections, districts, and corridor overlays used by the visual benchmark.

name: Traffic monitoring references
description: Reference material for interpreting the city's traffic monitoring service and event constraints.

name: OpenStreetMap road context
description: Road geometry and street context only. Not a traffic source.
